title: sesamum integribracteatum subsp. ellipticum
intro: Sesamum integribracteatum subsp. ellipticum, also known as the elephant's tusk, is a plant species found in various parts of Africa and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Sesamum integribracteatum subsp. ellipticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
